text.p: My new laptop has not been able to connect me with yahoo account in my room here. Only My account enters without stress. I suspect I need to adjust something there. It the new vista and it discreminate alot. to intall any thing I need to give special permission on the system. You know I sold my previous laptop for this new one in Nigeria. I pray I master the Use well.
Once I could get round the Yahoo connection I will connect you. My love to brother . I need his address on my account too.

You are blessed. I hope you are hearing from Mummy and Daddy in Nigeria. I am fine. They Are talking about swine flu in City and some other states but we have started to pray that the Lord wipe away that virus in jesus name.

This is to express my very warm appreciations for all you and your husband did to see that 's wedding is a success. You are simply wonderful and appreciated. May the Lord of heaven repay your labour of love.
I pray that the Christian family will continue to see more of a show of love and demonstrations of God's kindness to humanity.
We very much appreciate you. May God bless you and find beautiful homes for your owns. And may the Lord continue to bind us together with the cord of love that can never be broken.
Thank you for your supports both in kind and cash. God bless you and make His face to shine upon you for ever and ever.
please send me your gsm number by text. i could not trace the one i got recently. This is why i have not been able to phone you.
on behalf of , myself, and our children .

Happy new year to u and ur family. I ve been trying your number for a while but I was told by that you are outside the country. Just wanted to say hello, how are your boys doing. My regards to everybody ma.
Ma, I need your prayers. God has kept me this long although it has not been easy. I remember your advice almost all the time and I want to thank God for you. Ti yin oni baje ni oruko Oluwa.
Ma, my fiance wants us to get married this year but I will prefer it during or after my service year, so that we can at least have some money to fall back on.

He is from the tribe and he his the first son, although he has been working in the bank for close to six years with his ND National Diploma, he just finished from LASU and we are waiting for his results. He is writing his ACCA Associate Certified Chartered Accountants. He has alot of family obligations and we dont really have much at the moment. He stays in a selfcontain but we have to share the toilet and bathroom. I am not really comfortable with this.

He wants me to tell my fathers reelatives but am objecting to it becos I know they will not be happy about the arrangement, moreso the expenses of the wedding will be basically on both of us. His parents are also of the opinion that we wait. He said we should go to the registry and after a while do traditional wedding and blessing of marriagge but I am not comfortable with this becos of the transition btw the time of the registry and the blessing of marriage.
This has been going on for a while and I am sincerely fed up of the whole situation, pls ma, I need your advice.
